'''Scimitar 2''' was a [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bomber]] manufactured by [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]]<ref name="DB" /> that served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy's]] [[Scimitar Squadron (Imperial)/Legends|Scimitar Squadron]]. At one point, the [[Bomber/Legends|bomber]] was struck by an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] in the [[Anoat system/Legends|Anoat system]] and underwent repairs.<ref name="SWCCG" /> By [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="FF">{{FactFile|11|END 7-10|The Battle of Endor}}</ref> Scimitar 2 was stationed on the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Death Star II/Legends|second Death Star]] [[Battle station/Legends|battle station]].<ref name="SWCCG" />

By that [[Time/Legends|time]], Scimitar 2 was [[Pilot/Legends|flown]] by the [[TIE pilot]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Jonus/Legends|Jonus]], who often flew as top cover during [[Bomb/Legends|bombing]] runs.<ref name="Jonus" /> In 4 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]], Scimitar Squadron was stationed in the [[Endor system/Legends|Endor system]], assigned with destroying any ground [[Troop/Legends|troops]] or equipment that might land on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]],<ref name="FF" /> which contained the [[Endor shield generator bunker|shield generator]] protecting the [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]].<ref name="ROTJ">{{Film|VI}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Scimitar 2's origins lie with a [[TIE series/Legends|TIE/sa]] bomber prop for the [[1980]] [[original trilogy]] film [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']].<ref name="SWC">''[[Star Wars Chronicles]]''</ref> The bomber was created [[in-universe]] for the [[2000]] ''[[Death Star II Limited]]'' expansion of the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]], produced by [[Decipher]]<ref name="SWCCG" />
